pageContext.name: PG RX-0 Unicorn Gundam 1:60
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Bandai are excited to present the PG RX-0 Unicorn Gundam 1:60 Model Kit!  Seen in the anime Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn, this 1:60 scale Perfect Grade model kit is fully transformable from regular to Destroy Mode and Destroy Mode Unchained once completed. This set includes pieces to build a custom display base to store weaponry.  Don't miss your chance to add this model kit to your collection!
